title: Egyptian Fry-Up
description: A hearty and flavorful breakfast dish inspired by Egyptian cuisine. This recipe combines crispy fried eggs with spicy garlicky beans and a side of stir-fried vegetables.

ingredients.name: stir-fry vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms

ingredients.name: oil
ingredients.notes: vegetable or canola oil for frying

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Crack eggs into the skillet and fry until the whites are set and the yolks are cooked to your desired doneness.
Add garlicky beans to the skillet and stir to combine with eggs.
Add stir-fry vegetables to the skillet and stir-fry until they are tender-crisp.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the Egyptian Fry-Up hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
